ValidationRule.description: When the opp is closed (0% and 100%) this field should be locked from editing to all users except for Bizops
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Annual_price_increase_on_T_C_s__c), OR( Probability = 0, Probability = 1 ), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')) , $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Wolves' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only BizOps team can edit this field once the opportunity is Closed
